'''Kennis Radi''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who served as a member of the [[Legislative Youth Program/Legends|Legislative Youth Program]] during the [[Separatist Crisis/Legends|Separatist Crisis]].

==Biography==
In [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], Radi held the position of [[Junior Chancellor]] in the Youth Program's simulation of the vote on the [[Military Creation Act/Legends|Military Creation Act]]. The mock [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Senate]] session took place, as every year, in [[Hanna City/Legends|Hanna City]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Chandrila/Legends|Chandrila]].

==Appearances==
